title: City warn Madrid with legal action over Haaland
summary: Manchester City has threatened legal action against Real Madrid after a presidential candidate promised to sign Erling Haaland if elected. The move highlights escalating tensions between the clubs over transfer matters.
content: Manchester City have threatened legal action after Real Madrid presidential candidate Enrique Riquelme promised to sign Erling Haaland if he's elected.

zh.title: 曼城就哈兰德问题向皇马发出法律警告
zh.summary: 曼城对皇马威胁采取法律行动，因为一名总统候选人承诺如果当选将签下埃尔林·哈兰德。此举凸显了两家俱乐部在转会事务上的紧张关系升级。

title: Benfica: Madrid must pay $17M to sign Mourinho
summary: Real Madrid would need to pay Benfica €15 million to hire José Mourinho as head coach if president Florentino Pérez is re-elected. The Portuguese club publicly announced the compensation requirement.
content: Real Madrid will have to pay Benfica €15 million to sign José Mourinho as coach if Florentino Pérez is re-elected as Madrid president, the Portuguese club said on Thursday.

zh.title: 本菲卡：皇马必须支付1700万美元才能聘请穆里尼奥
zh.summary: 如果总裁弗洛伦蒂诺·佩雷斯再次当选，皇马需要向本菲卡支付1500万欧元以聘请何塞·穆里尼奥担任主教练。这家葡萄牙俱乐部公开宣布了这一赔偿要求。

title: Sources: Forest reject City's Anderson offer
summary: Manchester City's opening bid for midfielder Elliot Anderson has been rejected by Nottingham Forest. The rejection suggests Forest may be holding out for a higher offer.
content: Manchester City have had their opening bid for Elliot Anderson rejected by Nottingham Forest, sources have told ESPN.

zh.title: 据悉：诺丁汉森林拒绝曼城的安德森报价
zh.summary: 曼城对中场球员埃利奥特·安德森的首次报价遭到诺丁汉森林拒绝。这一拒绝表明诺丁汉森林可能在期待更高的报价。

title: FIFA ban water bottles inside stadiums at WC
summary: FIFA has implemented a last-minute policy change prohibiting fans from bringing refillable water bottles into the 16 World Cup stadiums across North America. The decision significantly restricts what spectators can bring to matches.
content: FIFA has made a late change of policy to bar World Cup fans from bringing refillable water bottles into the tournament's 16 stadiums across North America.

zh.title: FIFA禁止球迷在世界杯体育场内携带水瓶
zh.summary: FIFA实施了最后时刻的政策变化，禁止球迷将可重复使用的水瓶带入北美16个世界杯体育场。这一决定大幅限制了观众能够携带进场的物品。

title: CEO: Man Utd will follow PL template for signings
summary: Manchester United CEO Omar Berrada indicated the club will continue targeting Premier League-experienced players in upcoming transfer windows, following successful signings of Bryan Mbeumo and Matheus Cunha last summer. The strategy prioritizes players already familiar with English football.
content: Manchester United CEO Omar Berrada has hinted that the club will again look to target players with Premier League experience in the transfer window after signing Bryan Mbeumo and Matheus Cunha from domestic rivals last summer.

zh.title: CEO：曼联将遵循英超模板进行引援
zh.summary: 曼联CEO奥马尔·贝拉达表示，俱乐部将继续在即将到来的转会窗口中目标定位于具有英超经验的球员，参照去年夏天成功签约布莱恩·姆布埃莫和马蒂乌斯·库尼亚的战略。这一做法优先选择已经熟悉英超足球的球员。

title: Iran players: U.S. politics, war affect WC prep
summary: Iran midfielder Saeid Ezatolahi acknowledged that preparing for the World Cup in Turkey while his country faces military conflict presents significant mental challenges. The geopolitical situation has complicated the team's preparation efforts.
content: Iran midfielder Saeid Ezatolahi admitted on Wednesday that preparing for the FIFA World Cup in Turkiye while his country is at war with the primary host nation has been a mental challenge.

zh.title: 伊朗球员：美国政治、战争影响世界杯备战
zh.summary: 伊朗中场球员赛义德·埃扎托拉希承认，在国家面临军事冲突之际，在土耳其为世界杯做准备呈现出重大的心理挑战。地缘政治局势使球队的备战工作变得复杂化。

title: Giuliani: WC security challenge 'unprecedented'
summary: Andrew Giuliani, executive director of the White House FIFA World Cup 2026 Task Force, stated that this summer's World Cup will present an unprecedented security challenge due to its scope and scale. Law enforcement agencies are committed to meeting the challenge, he said.
content: This summer's World Cup will pose an unprecedented security challenge due to its size and scope, but the nation's law enforcement is "leaning in," Andrew Giuliani, executive director of the White House FIFA World Cup 2026 Task Force, told ESPN.

zh.title: 朱利亚尼：世界杯安保挑战"前所未有"

title: Neymar to miss Brazil's final pre-WC friendly
summary: Neymar will not join the Brazil squad for their final World Cup preparation match against Egypt on Saturday. The star forward's absence comes as the team makes final preparations ahead of the tournament.

title: Guardiola quit '100 times' in the past - Khaldoon

title: Argentina fans arrive after cycling to Kansas
summary: Three Argentine fans completed a 10,500-mile cycling journey from their hometown of Gualeguaychu to Kansas to attend their nation's World Cup opening match. Their extraordinary effort demonstrates the dedication of supporters traveling to support their team at the tournament.
content: Three friends from Argentina arrive in Missouri in Kansas after cycling 10,500 miles from their home in Gualeguaychu to the venue of their team's opening game of the World Cup.

title: Unsold Scotland World Cup tickets put on resale sites

content: Dozens of tickets for the Scotland vs Haiti match on 12 June are listed on the third-party sites.

zh.summary: 苏格兰对阵海地的世界杯比赛（6月12日）的未售出门票出现在第三方转售网站上。这一发展突显了关于门票分配和即将举行的比赛可及性的问题。

content: Famous owners but stuck in League Two with another manager sacked - what's happening at Salford City?

content: Former Scotland striker Alan Brazil says he is "very, very lucky to be here" after recent liver transplant.

title: Heat experts warn 'reckless' Fifa of bottle ban health risk
summary: Fifa has banned reusable water bottles from World Cup stadiums due to safety concerns, a decision that heat experts are criticizing as potentially dangerous during hot weather. The last-minute policy change raises concerns about fan welfare at the tournament.

zh.title: 高温专家警告国际足联水瓶禁令"鲁莽"且有健康风险
zh.summary: 由于安全考虑，国际足联禁止在世界杯体育场使用可重复使用的水瓶，高温专家批评这一决定在炎热天气下可能很危险。这一仓促的政策变化引发了人们对锦标赛期间球迷福祉的担忧。

summary: Midfielder Calvin Miller has agreed to a three-year contract with Hearts, joining from Falkirk later this month. The transfer strengthens Hearts' squad composition ahead of the upcoming season.

title: Toone learned 'massive lesson' from hip injury setback
summary: England footballer Ella Toone stated she learned a "massive lesson" from her recent hip injury and is now ready to return to competition. Her recovery reflects her determination to overcome setbacks and contribute to her team.
content: Ella Toone says she learned a "massive lesson" from her recent injury setback and now she is ready to perform again for England.

title: Man City consider legal action over Real candidate's promise to sign Haaland

content: After a candidate in Real Madrid's presidential election unveils an Erling Haaland shirt on live TV, Manchester City dismiss the suggestion their striker will move to Spain.

title: Two goals in 41 games - what next for Delap at Chelsea?

The article highlights the broader positive impact of professional athletes on youth football development.

content: Liverpool teenager Lewis Koumas is determined to prove his worth in a Wales shirt having helped Hull City gain promotion into the Premier League.

zh.title: 利物浦库马斯威尔士进球后证明价值
zh.summary: 利物浦少年刘易斯·库马斯在帮助赫尔城获得英超升级后，寻求在国际足球中确立自己的资历。这位年轻球员希望在世界杯上穿着威尔士球衣证明自己的价值。

title: Wales diverted as weather hits Montenegro qualifier
summary: Wales' preparations for their Women's World Cup qualifier against Montenegro have been disrupted by severe weather, forcing the team to divert to Italy. The travel complications add unexpected challenges ahead of Friday's match.
content: Wales diverted to Italy as bad weather badly disrupts preparations for Friday's Women's World Cup qualifier in Montenegro.

zh.title: 威尔士因天气影响黑山预选赛而改道
zh.summary: 威尔士女足世界杯预选赛对黑山的准备工作因恶劣天气而中断，被迫改道前往意大利。旅行并发症在周五比赛前增加了意想不到的挑战。
